'''razungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miaskite|miaskite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miaskite|miaskite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| razungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzingith|ræzingith]] || [[word:ræzingij|ræzingij]] || [[word:ræzingish|ræzingish]] || [[word:ræzingi|ræzingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:razuzunguth|razuzunguth]] || [[word:razuzunguj|razuzunguj]] || [[word:razuzungush|razuzungush]] || [[word:razuzungu|razuzungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:razunguth|razunguth]] || [[word:razunguj|razunguj]] || [[word:razungush|razungush]] || [[word:razungu|razungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:razufngufth|razufngufth]] || [[word:razufngufj|razufngufj]] || [[word:razufngufsh|razufngufsh]] || [[word:razufnguf|razufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razunguthu|razunguthu]] || [[word:razunguju|razunguju]] || [[word:razungushu|razungushu]] || [[word:razunguku|razunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razunguth|razunguth]] || [[word:razunguj|razunguj]] || [[word:razungush|razungush]] || [[word:razungu|razungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razunguthul|razunguthul]] || [[word:razungujul|razungujul]] || [[word:razungushul|razungushul]] || [[word:razungukul|razungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razunguuthuthu|razunguuthuthu]] || [[word:razunguujuju|razunguujuju]] || [[word:razunguushushu|razunguushushu]] || [[word:razunguuku|razunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razunguthun|razunguthun]] || [[word:razungujun|razungujun]] || [[word:razungushun|razungushun]] || [[word:razungukun|razungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razunguthuoro|razunguthuoro]] || [[word:razungujuoro|razungujuoro]] || [[word:razungushuoro|razungushuoro]] || [[word:razungukuoro|razungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
